sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76617" key="paidokome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παιδο-κομέω</orth>, <sense id="n76617.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take care of a child,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.623</biblScope> </bibl>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aemil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
